evidence.note: BEI Québec restructured URLs from .html-extension paths to a /liste cleaner-URL scheme. Original URL 404s; the investigation list moved to /enquetes/liste behind a 307. Documented at first crawl 2026-04-22.

IIU Manitoba site went dark between 2026-03-04 and 2026-04-22. iiumanitoba.ca DNS resolves but every path 302-redirects to manitoba.ca/404.html. No successor URL announced. Crawler now routes through Wayback proxy.
